text.title: SLO Burn-Rate Review Protocol Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure to apply slo-burn-rate-review-protocol. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Gather inputs
step.description: Input: Prerequisites table. Action: Collect each required input.. Output: Input bundle..

step.name: Apply rules
step.description: Input: Input bundle. Action: Walk 01-core-rules.xml rule by rule.. Output: Rule-checked draft..

step.name: Author artefact
step.description: Input: Rule-checked draft. Action: Produce the output described in 02-output-contract.xml.. Output: Draft artefact..

step.name: Self-check + sign-off
step.description: Input: Draft artefact. Action: Run validator + checklist; sign-off.. Output: Final artefact..
